turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: How have you been?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I'm swamped with the kids & work. What's up with you? Anything new?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I went to a LGBTQ support group yesterday and it was so powerful.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: What happened that was so awesome? Did you hear any inspiring stories?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: The transgender stories were so inspiring!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: What's it done for you?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: The support group has made me feel accepted and given me courage to embrace myself.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: What now?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Gonna continue my edu and check out career options, which is pretty exciting!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: What kinda jobs are you thinkin' of? Anything that stands out?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I'm keen on counseling or working in mental health - I'd love to support those with similar issues.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: You'd be a great counselor! Your empathy and understanding will really help the people you work with.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Is this your own painting?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I painted that lake sunrise last year! It's special to me.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: The colors really blend nicely. Painting looks like a great outlet for expressing yourself.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Painting's a fun way to express my feelings and get creative. It's a great way to relax after a long day.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Relaxing and expressing ourselves is key. Well, I'm off to go do some research.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Taking care of ourselves is vital.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I ran a charity race for mental health last Saturday – it was really rewarding. Really made me think about taking care of our minds.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Making a difference & raising awareness for mental health is super rewarding - I'm really proud of you for taking part!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: The event was really thought-provoking. I'm starting to realize that self-care is really important. It's a journey for me, but when I look after myself, I'm able to better look after my family.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Taking care of ourselves is so important - even if it's not always easy. Great that you're prioritizing self-care.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I'm carving out some me-time each day - running, reading, or playing my violin - which refreshes me and helps me stay present for my fam!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Taking time for yourself is so important.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: My kids are so excited about summer break! We're thinking about going camping next month. Any fun plans for the summer?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Researching adoption agencies — it's been a dream to have a family and give a loving home to kids who need it.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Taking in kids in need - you're so kind. Your future family is gonna be so lucky to have you!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: My goal is to give kids a loving home. I'm truly grateful for all the support I've got from friends and mentors. Now the hard work starts to turn my dream into a reality. And here's one of the adoption agencies I'm looking into. It's a lot to take in, but I'm feeling hopeful and optimistic.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: What made you pick it?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I chose them 'cause they help LGBTQ+ folks with adoption. Their inclusivity and support really spoke to me.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Anything you're excited for in the adoption process?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I'm thrilled to make a family for kids who need one. It'll be tough as a single parent, but I'm up for the challenge!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Creating a family for those kids is so lovely.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I'll do my best to make sure these kids have a safe and loving home.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: You have such a caring heart - they'll get all the love and stability they need! Excited for this new chapter!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I wanted to tell you about my school event last week. I talked about my transgender journey and encouraged students to get involved in the LGBTQ community. It made me reflect on how far I've come since I started transitioning three years ago.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Sounds like your event was amazing! I'm so proud of you for spreading awareness and getting others involved in the LGBTQ community. You've come a long way since your transition - keep on inspiring people with your strength and courage!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I felt super powerful giving my talk. I shared my own journey, the struggles I had and how much I've developed since coming out. It was wonderful to see how the audience related to what I said and how it inspired them to be better allies. Conversations about gender identity and inclusion are so necessary and I'm thankful for being able to give a voice to the trans community.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Caroline, you're doing an awesome job of inspiring others with your journey. Talking about inclusivity and acceptance is crucial, and you're so brave to speak up for the trans community. Keep up the great work!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Sharing our experiences isn't always easy, but I feel it's important to help promote understanding and acceptance. I've been blessed with loads of love and support throughout this journey, and I want to pass it on to others. By sharing our stories, we can build a strong, supportive community of hope.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: It takes courage to talk about our own stories. But it's in these vulnerable moments that we bond and understand each other. We all have our different paths, but if we share them, we show people that they're not alone. Our stories can be so inspiring and encouraging to others who are facing the same challenges. Thank you for using your voice to create love, acceptance, and hope.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I'm grateful for the chance to share my story and give others hope. We all have unique paths, and by working together we can build a more inclusive and understanding world. I'm going to keep using my voice to make a change and lift others up.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I'm so proud to be part of the difference you're making. Let's keep motivating and helping each other out as we journey through life. We can make a real impact together!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: We can tackle life's challenges together!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Your courage is inspiring. I want to be couragous for my family- they motivate me and give me love. What motivates you?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: My friends, family and mentors are my rocks – they motivate me and give me the strength to push on.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: How long have you had such a great support system?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: They've been there through everything, I've known these friends for 4 years, since I moved from my home country. Their love and help have been so important especially after that tough breakup. Who supports you, Mel?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I'm lucky to have my husband and kids; they keep me motivated.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: How long have you been married?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: 5 years already! Time flies- feels like just yesterday I put this dress on!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: You both looked so great on your wedding day!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Our family and moments make it all worth it.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: We played games, ate good food, and just hung out together. Family moments make life awesome.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Cherish the moments - they're the best!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I cherish time with family. It's when I really feel alive and happy.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Hanging with loved ones is amazing and brings so much happiness. Those moments really make me thankful. Family is everything.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: A lot's been going on in my life! Take a look at this.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Love the necklace, any special meaning to it?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: This necklace is super special to me - a gift from my grandma in my home country, Sweden. She gave it to me when I was young, and it stands for love, faith and strength. It's like a reminder of my roots and all the love and support I get from my family.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: It's awesome what items can mean so much to us. Got any other objects that you treasure, like that necklace?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I've got some other stuff with sentimental value, like my hand-painted bowl. A friend made it for my 18th birthday ten years ago. The pattern and colors are awesome-- it reminds me of art and self-expression.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I just took my fam camping in the mountains last week - it was a really nice time together!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: How was it? Anything fun?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: We explored nature, roasted marshmallows around the campfire and even went on a hike. The view from the top was amazing. The 2 younger kids love nature.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Family moments like that are so special. Glad y'all had such a great time.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Family time matters to me.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Lately, I've been looking into counseling and mental health as a career. I want to help people who have gone through the same things as me.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: What kind of counseling and mental health services do you want to persue?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I'm thinking of working with trans people, helping them accept themselves and supporting their mental health. Last Friday, I went to an LGBTQ+ counseling workshop and it was really enlightening. They talked about different therapeutic methods and how to best work with trans people. Seeing how passionate these pros were about making a safe space for people like me was amazing.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Caroline, it sounds like you're doing some impressive work. It's inspiring to see your dedication to helping others. What motivated you to pursue counseling?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: My own journey and the support I got made a huge difference. Now I want to help people go through it too. I saw how counseling and support groups improved my life, so I started caring more about mental health and understanding myself. Now I'm passionate about creating a safe, inviting place for people to grow.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: You've gained so much from your own experience. Your passion and hard work to help others is awesome. Keep it up, you're making a big impact!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Good on you for going after what you really care about.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Last week I went to an LGBTQ+ pride parade. Everyone was so happy and it made me feel like I belonged. It showed me how much our community has grown, it was amazing!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: It's great to see the love and support for the LGBTQ+ community. Congrats! Has this experience influenced your goals at all?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Talking to the community made me want to use my story to help others too - I'm still thinking that counseling and mental health is the way to go. I'm super excited to give back.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I just signed up for a pottery class yesterday. It's like therapy for me, letting me express myself and get creative. Have you found any activities that make you feel the same way?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I'm getting creative too, just learning the piano. What made you try pottery?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I'm a big fan of pottery - the creativity and skill is awesome. Plus, making it is so calming.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: That bowl is gorgeous! The black and white design looks so fancy. Did you make it?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I made this bowl in my class. It took some work, but I'm pretty proud of it.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: You really put in the work and it definitely shows. Your creativity looks great!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Pottery is a huge part of my life, not just a hobby - it helps me express my emotions. Clay is incredible, it brings me so much joy!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Art is helping you express yourself and bring you joy! Keep it up!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I'm excited to see where pottery takes me. Anything coming up you're looking forward to?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I'm going to a transgender conference this month. I'm so excited to meet other people in the community and learn more about advocacy. It's gonna be great!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Lots has been going on since then!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Missed you. Anything new? Spill the beans!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Since our last chat, I've been looking into counseling or mental health work more. I'm passionate about helping people and making a positive impact. It's tough, but really rewarding too.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Yesterday I took the kids to the museum - it was so cool spending time with them and seeing their eyes light up!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: What were they so stoked about?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: They were stoked for the dinosaur exhibit! They love learning about animals and the bones were so cool.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Being a mom is awesome. I'm creating a library for when I have kids. I'm really looking forward to reading to them and opening up their minds.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: What kind of books you got in your library?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I've got lots of kids' books- classics, stories from different cultures, educational books, all of that. What's a favorite book you remember from your childhood?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I loved reading "Charlotte's Web" as a kid. It was so cool seeing how friendship and compassion can make a difference.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: It sure shows how important friendship and compassion are. It's made me appreciate how lucky I am to have my friends and family helping with my transition. They make all the difference. We even had a picnic last week!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: How have your friends and fam been helping you out with your transition?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: They've been there for me every step of the way giving me love, guidance, and acceptance. I couldn't have done it without them.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: It's great you have people to support you

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Their love and encouragement has really helped me accept and grow into my true self. They've been instrumental in my transition.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Here's a pic of my family camping at the beach.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I went to an LGBTQ conference two days ago and it was really special. I got the chance to meet and connect with people who've gone through similar journeys. It was such a welcoming environment and I felt totally accepted. I'm really thankful for this amazing community - it's shown me how important it is to fight for trans rights and spread awareness.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: So glad you felt accepted and supported. Events like these are great for reminding us of how strong community can be!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Having people who back you makes such a huge difference. It's great to see how far LGBTQ rights have come, but there's still plenty of progress to be made. I wanna help make a difference.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: We've come so far, but there's more to do. Your drive to help is awesome! What's your plan to pitch in?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I'm still looking into counseling and mental health jobs. It's important to me that people have someone to talk to, and I want to help make that happen.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: You're so inspiring for wanting to help others with their mental health. What's pushing you to keep going forward with it?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I struggled with mental health, and support I got was really helpful. It made me realize how important it is for others to have a support system. So, I started looking into counseling and mental health career options, so I could help other people on their own journeys like I was helped.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Caroline, your experience really brought you to where you need to be. You're gonna make a huge difference! This book I read last year reminds me to always pursue my dreams, just like you are doing!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Seeing this pic just made me appreciate my love of reading even more. Books guide me, motivate me and help me discover who I am. They're a huge part of my journey, and this one's reminding me to keep going and never give up!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Books have such an awesome power! Which one has been your favorite guide?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I loved "Becoming Nicole" by Amy Ellis Nutt. It's a real inspiring true story about a trans girl and her family. It made me feel connected and gave me a lot of hope for my own path. Highly recommend it.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: What did you take away from it to use in your life?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: It taught me self-acceptance and how to find support. It also showed me that tough times don't last - hope and love exist. Pets bring so much joy too, though.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Caroline, those lessons are great - self-acceptance and finding support are key. Plus pets are awesome for joy and comfort, can't agree more!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: What pet do you have?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: We've got a pup and a kitty. That's the dog, and here's our cat! They brighten up our day and always make us smile.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: What are their names?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Luna and Oliver! They are so sweet and playful - they really liven up the house! Just got some new shoes, too!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: For walking or running?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: These are for running. Been running longer since our last chat - a great way to destress and clear my mind.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: What got you into running?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I've been running farther to de-stress, which has been great for my headspace.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Running can really boost your mood.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: This has been great for my mental health. I'm gonna keep it up.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Mental health's a priority, so make sure you take care of yourself.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Mental health is important to me, and it's made such an improvement!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Been a busy week since we talked.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Last Fri I finally took my kids to a pottery workshop. We all made our own pots, it was fun and therapeutic!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: How'd they like it?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: The kids loved it! They were so excited to get their hands dirty and make something with clay. It was special to watch their creativity and imagination come to life, they made this!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: That cup is so cute. It's awesome to see how kids show their personalities through art. What other creative projects do you do with them, besides pottery?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: We love painting together lately, especially nature-inspired ones. Here's our latest work from last weekend.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: The colors are so bold and it really highlights the beauty of nature. Y'all work on it together?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: We both helped with the painting - it was great bonding over it and chatting about nature. We found these lovely flowers. Appreciating the small things in life, too.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Last Friday I went to a council meeting for adoption. It was inspiring and emotional - so many people wanted to create loving homes for children in need. It made me even more determined to adopt.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: What do you think of these?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Blue's my fave, it makes me feel relaxed. Sunflowers mean warmth and happiness, right? While roses stand for love and beauty? What do flowers mean to you?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Flowers bring joy. They represent growth, beauty and reminding us to appreciate the small moments. They were an important part of my wedding decor and always remind me of that day.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: It must have been special at your wedding.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: The day was full of love and joy. Everyone we love was there to celebrate us - it was really special.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: What was your favorite part?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Marrying my partner and promising to be together forever was the best part.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: One special memory for me was this pride parade I went to a few weeks ago.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Did you join in?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: It was amazing! I felt so accepted and happy, just being around people who accepted and celebrated me. It's definitely a top memory.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: How did it make you feel?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I felt so proud and grateful - the vibes were amazing and it was comforting to know I'm not alone and have a great community around me.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: How did it feel to be around so much love and acceptance?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Being around people who embrace and back me up is beyond words. It really inspired me.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: What's been the best part of it?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Realizing I can be me without fear and having the courage to transition was the best part. It's so freeing to express myself authentically and have people back me up.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: You've found the courage to be yourself - that's important for our mental health and finding peace.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Been a long road, but I'm proud of how far I've come. How're you doing finding peace?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Creativity and family keep me at peace.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: How have your family been supportive during your move?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: My fam's been awesome - they helped out and showed lots of love and support.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: family love and support is the best!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: my family's been great - their love and support really helped me through tough times. We even went on another camping trip in the forest.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Family support's huge. What else do you guys like doing together?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: We enjoy hiking in the mountains and exploring forests.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Exploring nature and family time is so special.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: they're some of my fave memories. It brings us together and brings us happiness. Glad you're here to share in it.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Really glad to have you as a friend to share my journey.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Appreciate your friendship. It's great to have a supporter!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Your friendship means so much to me.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I had a quiet weekend after we went camping with my fam two weekends ago. It was great to unplug and hang with the kids. What've you been up to? Anything fun over the weekend?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Last weekend I joined a mentorship program for LGBTQ youth - it's really rewarding to help the community.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: How's it going? Got any cool experiences you can share?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: The mentoring is going great! I've met some amazing young folks and supported them along the way. It's inspiring to see how resilient and strong they are.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Young people's resilience is amazing. Care to share some stories?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I mentor a transgender teen just like me. We've been working on building up confidence and finding positive strategies, and it's really been paying off! We had a great time at the LGBT pride event last month.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: What was it like for you both? Care to fill me in?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: The pride event was awesome! It was so encouraging to be surrounded by so much love and acceptance.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: What's the best part you remember from it?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Seeing my mentee's face light up when they saw the support was the best! Such a special moment.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: They must have felt so appreciated. It's awesome to see the difference we can make in each other's lives. Any other exciting LGBTQ advocacy stuff coming up?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Next month I'm having an LGBTQ art show with my paintings - can't wait!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Can't wait to see your art - got any previews?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Check out my painting for the art show!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Caroline, that painting is awesome! Those colors are so vivid and the whole thing looks really unified. What inspired you?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I painted this after I visited a LGBTQ center. I wanted to capture everyone's unity and strength.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: My kids and I just finished another painting like our last one.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: What's up? Anything new since last time?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I just joined a new LGBTQ activist group last Tues. I'm meeting so many cool people who are as passionate as I am about rights and community support. I'm giving my voice and making a real difference, plus it's fulfilling in so many ways.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Glad to hear you found a great group where you can have an impact. Bet it feels great to be able to speak your truth and stand up for what's right. Want to tell me a bit more about it?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: It's awesome to have our own platform to be ourselves and support others' rights. Our group, 'Connected LGBTQ Activists', is made of all kinds of people investing in positive changes. We have regular meetings, plan events and campaigns, to get together and support each other.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Supporting each other and making good things happen. Have you been part of any events or campaigns lately?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Last weekend our city held a pride parade! So many people marched through the streets waving flags, holding signs and celebrating love and diversity. I missed it but it was a powerful reminder that we are not alone in this fight for equality and inclusivity. Change is possible!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Caroline! Bet the atmosphere was incredible. We went to the beach recently. It was awesome! The kids had such a blast.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: What was the best part? Do you do it often with the kids?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Seeing my kids' faces so happy at the beach was the best! We don't go often, usually only once or twice a year. But those times are always special to spend time together and chill.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Do you have any other summer traditions you all do together?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: We always look forward to our family camping trip. We roast marshmallows, tell stories around the campfire and just enjoy each other's company. It's the highlight of our summer!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: What's your best camping memory?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I'll always remember our camping trip last year when we saw the Perseid meteor shower. It was so amazing lying there and watching the sky light up with streaks of light. We all made wishes and felt so at one with the universe. That's a memory I'll never forget.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: What did it look like?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: The sky was so clear and filled with stars, and the meteor shower was amazing - it felt like we were part of something huge and awe-inspiring.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: That must've been breathtaking!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: It was one of those moments where I felt tiny and in awe of the universe. Reminds me how awesome life is - so many little moments like that.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: What other good memories do you have that make you feel thankful for life?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I'll never forget the day my youngest took her first steps. Seeing her wobble as she took those initial steps really put into perspective how fleeting life is and how lucky I am to be able to share these moments.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Those milestones are great reminders of how special our bonds are.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: It's special moments like these that make me appreciate life and how lucky I am to be with my family and have our love.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Melanie, what a beautiful moment! Lucky you to have such an awesome family!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I'm really lucky to have my family; they bring so much joy and love.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: We celebrated my daughter's birthday with a concert surrounded by music, joy and the warm summer breeze. Seeing my kids' smiles was so awesome, and I'm so thankful for our special moments together.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: What concert was it? The advocacy event was a cool experience - so much love and support, amazing!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: It was Matt Patterson, he is so talented! His voice and songs were amazing.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I went to a pride parade last Friday and it was awesome - so much energy and love everywhere. Really made me proud and reminded me how important it is to keep standing up for equality.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: How did it feel being part of that community?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Check out the crowd. People of all kinds celebrating love and acceptance - it really pushed me to keep fighting for LGBTQ rights.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: This pic's from last night - looks like everyone was having a blast! Reminds me it's important to cultivate a loving and accepting environment for our kids. How do you stay inclusive in your work as an artist?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Representing inclusivity and diversity in my art is important to me. I also use it to speak up for the LGBTQ+ community and push for acceptance.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: What's the main idea of your art?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: My art is about expressing my trans experience. It's my way of showing my story and helping people understand the trans community.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Your art's amazing, Caroline. I love how you use it to tell your stories and teach people about trans folks. I'd love to see another painting of yours!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: 'Embracing Identity' is all about finding comfort and love in being yourself. The woman in the painting stands for the journey of acceptance. My aim was to show warmth, love and self-acceptance.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I love the self-acceptance and love theme. How does art help you with your self-discovery and acceptance journey?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Art's allowed me to explore my transition and my changing body. It's been a great way to work through stuff I'm going through. I love that it teaches me to accept the beauty of imperfections.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Art can be so healing and a way to really connect with who you are. It's awesome that beauty can be found in the imperfections. We're all individual and wonderfully imperfect.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: It means a lot to share this with you.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Recently, I had a not-so-great experience on a hike. I ran into a group of religious conservatives who said something that really upset me. It made me think how much work we still have to do for LGBTQ rights. It's been so helpful to have people around me who accept and support me, so I know I'll be ok!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: It sucks when people are so closed-minded. Strong support really helps. FYI, I finished another pottery project - want to see a pic?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Can't wait to see your pottery project. Show me when you can!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: It was a great experience.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: That bowl is awesome. What gave you the idea for all the colors and patterns?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I'm obsessed with those, so I made something to catch the eye and make people smile. Plus, painting helps me express my feelings and be creative. Each stroke carries a part of me.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: You put so much effort and passion into it. Your creativity really shines. Seeing how art can be a source of self-expression and growth is truly inspiring.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I've always felt a strong connection to art, and it's been a huge learning experience. It's both a sanctuary and a source of comfort. I'm so glad to have something that brings me so much happiness and fulfillment.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Surrounding ourselves with things that bring us joy is important.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Life's tough but it's worth it when we have things that make us happy.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Finding those happy moments and clinging to them is key. It's what keeps us going, even when life's hard. I'm lucky to have people like you to remind me.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: You make life's struggles more bearable.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: It means a lot having you in my corner.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: You've always been there for me.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: We had a blast last year at the Pride fest. Those supportive friends definitely make everything worth it!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Wanna do a family outing this summer?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: We could do a family outing, or wanna plan something special for this summer, just us two? It'd be a great chance to catch up and explore nature!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Let's plan something special!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: We'll make some awesome memories!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I'll start thinking about what we can do.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Life's all about creating memories. Can't wait for the trip!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I took the first step towards becoming a mom - I applied to adoption agencies! It's a big decision, but I think I'm ready to give all my love to a child. I got lots of help from this adoption advice/assistance group I attended. It was great!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: How does it feel? Also, do you have any pets?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Parenting's such a big responsibility. And I do- Oscar, my guinea pig. He's been great.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: they're good- we got another cat named Bailey too. Here's a pic of Oliver. Can you show me one of Oscar?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: What’s the funniest thing Oliver's done? Check out this pic of him eating parsley! Veggies are his fave!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Oliver's hilarious! He hid his bone in my slipper once! Almost as silly as when I got to feed a horse a carrot.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I used to go horseback riding with my dad when I was a kid, we'd go through the fields, feeling the wind. It was so special. I've always had a love for horses!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Here's a photo of my horse painting I did recently.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Love all the details and how you got the horse's grace and strength. Do you like painting animals?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: It's peaceful and special. Horses have such grace!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Painting's great for expressing myself. I love creating art! Here's a recent self-portrait I made last week.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: How'd you feel while painting it?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Painting helps me explore my identity and be true to myself. It's definitely therapeutic.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Art's awesome for showing us who we really are and getting in touch with ourselves. What else helps you out?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Art gives me a sense of freedom, but so does having supportive people around, promoting LGBTQ rights and being true to myself. I want to live authentically and help others to do the same.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: You really care about being real and helping others. Wishing you the best on your adoption journey!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Excited for the future!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I'm here for you.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I went hiking last week and got into a bad spot with some people. It really bugged me, so I tried to apologize to them.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: It's tough when those things happen, but it's great you apologized. Takes a lot of courage and maturity! What do you think of this?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: That plate is awesome! Did you make it?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I made it in pottery class yesterday. Pottery's so relaxing and creative. Have you tried it yet?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I've been busy painting - here's something I just finished.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: What gave you the idea to paint it?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I painted it after I visited the beach last week. Just seeing the sun dip below the horizon, all the amazing colors - it was amazing and calming. So I just had to try to capture that feeling in my painting.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: The art really took me to that moment and I can feel the serenity. You captured the sunset perfectly, so peaceful!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: It means a lot to me that you can feel the sense of peace and serenity. Makes me feel connected.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Art is so cool like that - it connects us and helps us understand each other. I was actually just remembering yesterday, spending the day with my fam volunteering at a homeless shelter. It was hard to see how neglected some people are, but it was great to feel like we could make a difference.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Volunteering and making a difference- it's so heartwarming.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: What made you decide to transition and join the transgender community?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Finding a community where I'm accepted, loved and supported has really meant a lot to me. It's made a huge difference to have people who get what I'm going through. Stuff like this mural are really special to me!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Can you tell me more about why it's special to you?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: The rainbow flag mural is important to me as it reflects the courage and strength of the trans community. The eagle symbolizes freedom and pride, representing my own resilience and that of others.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Have you made any more art lately?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I made this stained glass window to remind myself and others that within us all is the key to discovering our true potential and living our best life.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: What inspired it?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: It was made for a local church and shows time changing our lives. I made it to show my own journey as a transgender woman and how we should accept growth and change.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: All those colors are incredible and the story it tells is so inspiring.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: It's a symbol of togetherness, to celebrate differences and be that much closer.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Where did you find it?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I was out walking in my neighborhood when I came across this cool rainbow sidewalk for Pride Month. It was so vibrant and welcoming, I had to take a picture! It reminds us that love and acceptance are everywhere—even where we least expect it.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Art can be in the most unlikely places. Love and acceptance really can be found everywhere.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Art can be a real mood-booster - I saw someone drawing on the ground the other day and it made me so happy. Creativity sure can lighten someone's day.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: The colors are so bright and the flowers are so pretty. Art is such a source of joy.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Art gives me so much joy. It helps me show my feelings and freeze gorgeous moments, like a bouquet of flowers.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Did you make that? It looks so real!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Drawing flowers is one of my faves. Appreciating nature and sharing it is great. What about you, Mel? What type of art do you love?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Painting landscapes and still life is my favorite! Nature's amazing, here's a painting I did recently.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Any more paintings coming up?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I'm feeling inspired by autumn so I'm planning a few. You got any cool art projects coming up?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I'm putting together an LGBTQ art show next month and I'm gonna show my paintings.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Can't wait to see your show - the LGBTQ community needs more platforms like this!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Gonna be a great night featuring LGBTQ artists and their awesome talents. We want it to spread understanding and acceptance - let's make it happen!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: What's been up since we talked?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I took my kids to a park yesterday. They had fun exploring and playing. It was nice seeing them have a good time outdoors. What's new with you?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I've been chasing my ambitions and had the chance to volunteer at an LGBTQ+ youth center. It was so gratifying to talk to similar young people. It made me remember how essential it is to be kind and show support.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Creating community and supporting each other, especially for kids, is really important. How did you feel about your time there? Anything that sticks out to you?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: It was awesome to see how strong the young people were, with all the challenges they face. I felt fulfilled guiding and supporting them. I even got to let them know they're not alone by sharing my story. Such a powerful, emotional experience.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Was connecting with those young folks meaningful for you?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: It reminded me of my own struggles in the past and how I felt alone. I was glad I could share my story and offer them support - it felt like I could make a difference.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Sharing your story and support might make a difference for a long time. What do you hope to do next time?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I'm definitely carrying on volunteering at the youth center. It's an important part of my life and I've made strong connections with people there. I really believe in community and supporting each other. So I wanna keep making a difference.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Any specific projects or activities you're looking forward to there?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: We're putting together a talent show for the kids next month.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: You know I love live music.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Did you see that band?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: It was from a show I went to. It was so much fun and reminded me of how music brings us together.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: What's the band?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: "Summer Sounds"- The playing an awesome pop song that got everyone dancing and singing. It was so fun and lively!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Music brings us together and brings joy. Playing and singing let me express myself and connect with others. So cathartic and uplifting.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: What type of music do you play?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Guitar's mostly my thing. Playing it helps me get my emotions out.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: What type of guitar? Been playing long?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I started playing acoustic guitar about five years ago; it's been a great way to express myself and escape into my emotions.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Any songs that have deep meaning for you?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: "Brave" by Sara Bareilles has a lot of significance for me. It's about being courageous and fighting for what's right. Whenever I hear this jam, I think about the paths I've taken and the progress I've made.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: It really fits with your journey and your determination to make a difference.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: You play any instruments?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I play clarinet! Started when I was young and it's been great. Expression of myself and a way to relax.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Got any fav tunes?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I'm a fan of both classical like Bach and Mozart, as well as modern music like Ed Sheeran's "Perfect".

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I had a wicked day out with the gang last weekend - we went biking and saw some pretty cool stuff. It was so refreshing, and the pic I'm sending is just stunning, eh?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: That pic is so beautiful, the colors really pop. Biking sounds like a great way to get out in nature. We went camping with the kids a few weeks ago, had a blast exploring the forest and hiking. Nature can be so refreshing for your soul. Any plans coming up?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I love all the yellow leaves, it looks so cozy. Seeing how excited they get for the little things is awesome, it's so contagious.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: It's awesome seeing the kids get excited learning something new about nature. Those moments make being a parent worth it. We roasted marshmallows and shared stories around the campfire. Those simple moments make the best memories. What inspires you with your volunteering?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I'm inspired seeing my work make a difference for the LGBTQ+ community. Knowing I'm helping create a more loving world is amazing. I'm really thankful for my friends, family and mentors' support. It inspires me to keep making art, too.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I love how it shows the togetherness and power you were talking about. How long have you been creating art?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Since I was 17 or so. I find it so empowering and cathartic. It's amazing how art can show things that are hard to put into words.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Seven years now, and I've finally found my real muses: painting and pottery. It's so calming and satisfying. Check out my pottery creation in the pic!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Melanie, those bowls are amazing! They each have such cool designs. I love that you chose pottery for your art. Painting and drawing have helped me express my feelings and explore my gender identity. Creating art was really important to me during my transition - it helped me understand and accept myself.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I love how it's both a creative outlet and a form of therapy. Have you ever thought about trying it or another art form?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I haven't done pottery yet. I'm game for trying new art. I might try it sometime! Check out this piece I made!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: This painting is awesome. Love the red and blue. What gave you the idea?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I made this painting to show my path as a trans woman. The red and blue are for the binary gender system, and the mix of colors means smashing that rigid thinking. It's a reminder to love my authentic self - it's taken a while to get here but I'm finally proud of who I am.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Caro, that painting is amazing. You've made so much progress. I'm proud of you for being your true self. What effect has the journey had on your relationships?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Some close friends kept supporting me, but a few weren't able to handle it. It wasn't easy, but I'm much happier being around those who accept and love me. Now my relationships feel more genuine.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Glad you've found people who uplift and accept you! Here's to a good time at the café last weekend - they even had thoughtful signs like this!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: That sign looks serious. Did anything happen?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: The sign was just a precaution, I had a great time.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Glad it all worked out and you had a good time at the park!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Those joyful moments definitely show us life's beauty.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I just contacted my mentor for adoption advice. I'm ready to be a mom and share my love and family.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I'm stoked to start this new chapter. It's been a dream to adopt and provide a safe, loving home for kids who need it. Do you have any experience with adoption, or know anyone who's gone through the process?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: A buddy of mine adopted last year. It was a long process, but now they're super happy with their new kid. Makes me feel like maybe I should do it too!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: It's a great way to add to your family and show your love. If you ever do it, let me know — I'd love to help in any way I can.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Got any tips for getting started on it?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Do your research and find an adoption agency or lawyer. They'll help with the process and provide all the info. Gather documents like references, financial info and medical checks. Don't forget to prepare emotionally, since the wait can be hard. It's all worth it in the end though.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Doing research and readying myself emotionally makes sense. BTW, recently I had a setback. Last month I got hurt and had to take a break from pottery, which I use for self-expression and peace.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Need any help?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: It was tough, but I'm doing ok. Been reading that book you recommended a while ago and painting to keep busy.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Got any paintings to show? I'd love to check them out.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Here's one I did last week. It's inspired by the sunsets. The colors make me feel calm. What have you been up to lately, artistically?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Love the colors and the chilled-out sunset vibe. What made you paint it? I've been trying out abstract stuff recently. It's kinda freeing, just putting my feelings on the canvas without too much of a plan. It's like a cool form of self-expression.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I painted it because it was calming. I've done an abstract painting too, take a look! I love how art lets us get our emotions out.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: The blue adds so much to it. What feelings were you hoping to portray?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I wanted a peaceful blue streaks to show tranquility. Blue calms me, so I wanted the painting to have a serene vibe while still having lots of vibrant colors.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: It's awesome how art can show emotions. I went to a poetry reading last Fri - it was really powerful! Ever been to one?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: never been to something like that. What was it about? What made it so special?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: It was a transgender poetry reading where transgender people shared their stories through poetry. It was a safe place for self-expression and it was really empowering to hear others share and celebrate their identities.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: What was the event like?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: The room was electric with energy and support! The posters were amazing, so much pride and strength! It inspired me to make some art.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: You drew it? What does it mean to you?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I drew it. It stands for freedom and being real. It's like a nudge to always stay true to myself and embrace my womanhood.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Showing off our true selves is the best thing ever.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Being ourselves is such a great feeling. It's an ongoing adventure of learning and growing.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Life's about learning and exploring. Glad we can be on this trip together.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: that roadtrip this past weekend was insane! We were all freaked when my son got into an accident. We were so lucky he was okay. It was a real scary experience. Thankfully it's over now.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Must have been traumatizing for you guys. Thank goodness your son's okay.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Our trip got off to a bad start. I was really scared when we got into the accident. Thankfully, my son's ok and that was a reminder that life is precious and to cherish our family.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Life's unpredictable, but moments like these remind us how important our loved ones are.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Family's super important to me. Especially after the accident, I've thought a lot about how much I need them. They mean the world to me and I'm so thankful to have them. Thankfully, they enjoyed the Grand Canyon a lot!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: How did they handle the accident?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: They were scared but we reassured them and explained their brother would be OK. They're tough kids.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Kids are amazingly resilient in tough situations. They have an amazing ability to bounce back.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: They give me the strength to keep going.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Our loved ones give us strength to tackle any challenge

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: They're my biggest motivation and support.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: They really are your rock.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: They're a real support.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: It helps during tougher times.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Having my fam around helps a lot. It makes hard times easier.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Is that recent? Looks like you all had fun!

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: we just did it yesterday! The kids loved it and it was a nice way to relax after the road trip.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: It really helps me reset and recharge. I love camping trips with my fam, 'cause nature brings such peace and serenity.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: What do you love most about camping with your fam?

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: We bond over stories, campfires and nature. It's so peaceful waking up to the sound of birds and the smell of fresh air - it always refreshes my soul.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I can picture waking up to nature.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Nature and quality time, can't beat it!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: They're priceless.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: I passed the adoption agency interviews last Friday. This is a big move towards my goal of having a family.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: These figurines I bought yesterday remind me of family love. Tell me, what's your vision for the future?

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: It really brings home how much love's in families - both blood and the ones we choose. I hope to build my own family and put a roof over kids who haven't had that before. For me, adoption is a way of giving back and showing love and acceptance.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Giving a home to needy kids is such a loving way to build a family. Those kids will be so supported and happy in their new home.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: My dream is to create a safe and loving home for these kids. Love and acceptance should be everyone's right, and I want them to experience it.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Everyone deserves that.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Finding self-acceptance was a long process, but now I'm ready to offer love and support to those who need it. It's empowering to make a positive difference in someone's life.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Respect for finding acceptance and helping others with what you've been through.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Transitioning wasn't easy and acceptance wasn't either, but the help I got from friends, family and people I looked up to was invaluable. They boosted me through tough times and helped me find out who I really am. That's why I want to pass that same support to anyone who needs it. Bringing others comfort and helping them grow brings me such joy.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: You found your true self and now you're helping others.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: This journey has been amazing and I'm grateful I get to share it and help others with theirs.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: I'm so glad we can always be there for each other.

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: Appreciate the support of those close to me. Their encouragement made me who I am.

turns.speaker: Melanie
turns.content: Being yourself is great!

turns.speaker: Caroline
turns.content: It's so freeing to just be yourself and live honestly. We can really accept who we are and be content.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: Lost my job as a banker yesterday, so I'm gonna take a shot at starting my own business.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: I also lost my job at Door Dash this month. What business are you thinking of?

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: I'm starting a dance studio 'cause I'm passionate about dancing and it'd be great to share it with others.

turns.content: What got you into this biz?

turns.speaker: Gina

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: I love all dances, but contemporary is my top pick. It's so expressive and powerful! What's your fave?

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Contemporary dance is so expressive and graceful - it really speaks to me.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: Let's go to a dance class, it'll be so much fun!

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Let's explore some new dance moves. We should plan a dance session soon!

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: Wanna see my moves next Fri?

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Next Friday works.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: This is gonna be great!

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: What did you get?

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: That pic's from when my dance crew took home first in a local comp last year. It was amazing up on that stage! I'm super keen to spread that intensity with other peeps. Gina, you ever been in any dance comps or shows?

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: I used to compete in a few dance competitions and shows. My fav memory was when my team won first place at a regionals at age fifteen. It was an awesome feeling of accomplishment!

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: What dance were you doing?

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: We just did a contemporary piece called "Finding Freedom." It was really emotional and powerful.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: Check my ideal dance studio by the water.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Got time to rehearse with a biz and a new store?

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: we will find a place like this that will inspire us!

turns.content: What dances do you practice? Got any projects planned?

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: I rehearsed with a small group of dancers after work. We do all kinds of dances, from contemporary to hip-hop. We've got some cool projects in the works. Finishing up choreography to perform at a nearby festival next month.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Are they yours at the festival? They're so graceful!

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: They're the ones performing at the festival! They've been practicing hard and will definitely impress with their grace and skill.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Can't wait to see them rock the festival.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: I just launched an ad campaign for my clothing store in hopes of growing the business. Starting my own store and taking risks is both scary and rewarding. I'm excited to see where it takes me!

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: All your hard work really paid off - congrats! Must be awesome to see your stuff on display.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: It's awesome seeing my vision happen. How's the dance studio going? Did you find the right spot?

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: I'm on the hunt for the ideal spot for my dance studio. I've been looking at different places and picturing how the space would look. I even found a place with great natural light. Oh, I've been to Paris yesterday. It was sooo cool.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Where is it? Got any other features you want to think about before you decide? Paris?! Never had a chance to visit it. Been only to Rome once.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: It's downtown which is awesome cuz it's easy to get to. Plus the natural light! Gotta check the size & floor quality too. We need a good dance floor with enough bounce for me & my students to dance safely.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Dance floors help avoid injuries and make dancing more enjoyable. Any particular type of flooring you like?

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: I'm after Marley flooring, which is what dance studios usually use. It's great 'cause it's grippy but still lets you move, plus it's tough and easy to keep clean.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Marley's perfect; it's got the right amount of grip and movement.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: Looking for the right place and getting everything ready has been a mix of exciting and nerve-wracking, but I'm determined to make it work. It'll be worth it!

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: The process may be tough, but you got this. Push through and it'll be worth it. Don't forget to take breaks and dance it out when you need to destress!

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: We'll make it through this

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: Let's keep going and chase our dreams!

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: We've done so much, and there's nothing but good stuff coming. Let's keep going after our goals and making them happen.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: Success is almost here.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: Still following my passion for dance. It's been bumpy, but I'm determined to make it work. I'm still searching for a place to open my dance studio.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: I emailed some wholesalers and one replied and said yes today! I'm over the moon because now I can expand my clothing store and get closer to my customers.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: You found the perfect spot for your store.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Here's a peek at the space I designed. Cozy and inviting - perfect for customers to check out all the trendy pieces.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: What made you pick out the furniture and decor?

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: I wanted to make the place look like my own style and make my customers feel cozy. I chose furniture that looks great and is comfy too. The chandelier adds a nice glam feel while matching the style of the store.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: Your store looks great - your customers will be so comfy.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Making my spot comfortable and inviting for my customers is key. I want 'em to feel like they're in a cool oasis. Just creating an experience that'll make 'em wanna come back.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: Creating a special experience for customers is the key to making them feel welcome and coming back.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: I'm sure with my hard work and effort, I can make a special shopping experience for my customers. It's tough but I'm up for the challenge!

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: Go create something awesome with your store.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: You're gonna do great with your dance studio, just keep going and stay positive! We'll get through this!

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: I'm staying positive and pushing forward. We've put our hearts into our dreams and I'm sure we'll make it.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Stay motivated and keep going. Hard work pays off eventually. We can do this!

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: I gotta tell you about this thing with my biz.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: The store's doing great! How's the biz?

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: I'm putting in a lot of work on my business even with the obstacles. I'm gonna make it happen!

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Keep it up and you'll definitely make a splash.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: Sometimes it's hard when things don't go my way, but I'm sure if I keep pushing, I'll reach my dreams!

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Setbacks are just opportunities for comebacks. You got the skills, passion, and drive. Plus my full support. Don't give up, buddy!

turns.content: Setbacks can be tough, but with your support, I can handle anything.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Anything you want to say about your biz?

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: Searching for a dance studio location has been tricky, but I'm determined to find the right spot

turns.content: Searching for the perfect dance studio's a tough job.

turns.content: I'm working on my business and some new dance routines - rehearsing hard for an upcoming show. I'm passionate about dancing and it brings me so much joy and fulfillment.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: What show ya got planned?

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: I'm getting ready for a dance comp near me next month. It's a great chance for me to show my skillz and, hopefully, get some props from the dance fam.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Your hard work and talent will pay off! Good luck.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: I'll do my best to make you proud!

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Your passion and commitment are awesome! Keep it up!

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: I'm going for my dreams!

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Make your dreams happen - keep going and believe in yourself.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: I won't give up!

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: I found a cool new fashion piece for my store. Can't wait to share with my customers.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: Congrats on the new fashion piece! Looks like your store is growing. Remenber the festival I told you about? Had that performance and it was awesome - so many people there complementing my dance moves. Dancing brings me joy and it was nice to be reminded why I'm passionate about it.

turns.content: You look badass on stage. BTW, what's your favorite part of running your own studio?

turns.content: I love running my own studio. It's great having the freedom to create a space and help dancers of all ages and levels express themselves. I'm super thrilled about dancing each day and seeing my students progress. It's so fulfilling.

turns.content: I'm sure you feel great knowing your students are doing so well with dance. It's amazing what it can do for people! I've been working hard on my online store and just teamed up with a local artist for some cool designs. Check 'em out!

turns.content: Your commitment and creativity in your business really stands out. How'd you come up with these cool designs?

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: You never shy away from a challenge and always try something new. I'm impressed by your willingness to take risks - it's really inspiring.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Taking risks is scary but it's the only way to grow. Just part of the journey to success.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: Taking risks is key for success. It's made me grow, and even got me out of my secure 9-5 as a banker. Now, I'm aiming to turn my dancing passion into a business. I'm determined to make it work, I just know it! That being said, I definitely don't underestimate the difficulties - it ain't been a walk in the park, that's for sure.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: It's tough starting a biz. You can make your studio work. And remember, I'm always here for you.

turns.content: I'll keep plugging away and stay optimistic.

turns.content: It's so important to have freedom and express ourselves without worry. Dance gives me an escape to be myself.

turns.content: Dancing lets us be ourselves and ain't nothing like the feeling it gives us. You're so dedicated to your studio, it's inspiring. Chase those dreams, buddy!

turns.content: Juggling both my passions can be tricky, but so rewarding. Dancing and running my biz need hard work, plus they give me energy for each other. My dance moves get me pumped to tackle my business goals, and successes there boost my drive to keep dreaming on the dance floor. It's a balancing act, but fun.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: You're amazing at juggling both your passions. Finding that happy medium is key - keep going and don't stop dreaming, buddy!

turns.content: I'm not gonna give up on my dreams - my dance studio and biz ventures need the hard work I'm putting in.

turns.content: Starting and running my own biz has had its ups and downs - but it's been an amazing ride!

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Your words are really encouraging. Glad my journey is inspiring others.

turns.content: We're both on different paths, but it's nice to have someone to root for us. We can do it!

turns.content: Having someone back us up is great. Let's keep going and reach success together!

turns.speaker: Gina

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: Here's to taking on new heights, and all the trials that come with it.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: my online clothing store has been a roller coaster but rewarding. Starting a business takes courage - you hang in there too!

turns.content: It's been tough, but I'm gonna make it happen. And hey, you're awesome with your store.

turns.content: Brand identity is key. Make sure yours stands out. Also be sure to build relationships with your customers – let them know you care. And don't forget to stay positive and motivate others. Your energy will be contagious!

turns.content: Seeing my students succeed motivates me. It's awesome to help them learn and reach their goals. Here's a photo of us after during one of the dance clases.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Seeing your students grow and succeed must be really fulfilling. Glad I can be part of this journey!

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: It's really made a huge difference and it feels great.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: It's nice to be part of something positive. Supporting your dreams is awesome!

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: Your help means a lot.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: I'm here for you, rooting for you all the way.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: I'm really grateful for your help with staying motivated.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Keep going and never give up!

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Believe in yourself. Even when it's tough, you got this! Keep going!

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: I'm gonna keep on believing in myself.

turns.content: How're you handling the changes?

turns.content: What helps you stay motivated?

turns.content: I'm passionate about dance and fashion so combining them lets me show my creativity and share my love with others. Plus, I can add dance-inspired items to my store!

turns.content: Customers love the new offers and promotions, which means I'm seeing more sales. People seem to really like my designs, so I'm always on the hunt for unique, trendy pieces. Growing my customer base is the main focus right now.

turns.content: I'm expanding my dance studio's social media presence and offering workshops and classes to local schools and centers. I'm also hosting a dance competition next month to showcase local talent and bring more attention to my studio. All the work's paying off - I'm seeing progress and the dancers are so excited. It's such a great feeling to give a place where people can express themselves through dance!

turns.content: That's fantastic that your studio's expanding and giving dancers an outlet. So proud of the progress you've made - keep it up!

turns.content: I'm definitely in for the show.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: Can't wait to see you!

turns.content: See you at the event!

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: Gina, good luck with your store!

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: I am always there for you!

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: I'm gonna keep pursuing my goals and I hope you do too!

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: I won't quit on my dreams.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Believe in yourself and keep pushing.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: I'm turning my loves of dance into a business. I'm sunk tons of time into the studio lately, and look at my students - they're already killing it. I'm even learning with them!

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: The dance studio looks awesome.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: I'm determined to make this studio work. Losing my job was tough but it gave me the push I needed to do what I love.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: Tough times can be a gateway to awesome things. Glad you worked up the courage to go after your dreams!

turns.content: I'm living my true self. Dancing makes me so happy, and now I get to share that with other people. Seeing my students get better at it brings me such joy.

turns.content: I do remember those dance classes! I used to love spending time in the studio. That photo looks awesome, brings back lots of memories. It's nice to know, dance is still your happy place.

turns.content: dance is awesome for expressing yourself and finding happiness. Here's one of my trophies from a dance contest, nice reminder of the hard work, dedication and joy it brings.

turns.content: Thanks for the support, it really means a lot.

turns.content: Gonna keep pushing and working hard. Won't let anything hold me back!

turns.content: I stay motivated by reminding myself of my successes and progress. It also helps to have a good support system. Just focus on why you started this – because you love it! Have faith in yourself.

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: Gotta focus on success and why I started. I love it and that'll keep my confidence up.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: You're incredibly talented and passionate about dance. Don't forget, believe in yourself and your abilities. Tackle any obstacle that comes your way and keep shining!

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: I'm gonna keep going and reach my dreams no matter what.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: We're in this together!

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: We'll keep pushing each other on this path.

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: We can do it!

turns.speaker: Jon
turns.content: Since we last spoke I am still working on the dance studio and things are looking up!

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: You're so inspiring taking it on and opening your own studio!

turns.speaker: Jon

turns.speaker: Gina
turns.content: With your determination and drive, your dance studio will be a huge success. Keep that positive outlook and keep going!

turns.content: Dance is my stress fix too. As soon as I start, all my worries vanish. It's amazing what we can do for our own mental health with something we enjoy.

turns.content: Dancing helps me de-stress. It's where I'm most alive. It's a must-have in my life.

turns.content: Dancing is like second nature to me. I'm living my dream by having my own dance studio and teaching others.

turns.speaker: Gina

turns.content: I like to just take a look at the sunset- it reminds me to enjoy the small things in life.
